parsed_review.summary: CP00-558 is a descriptor-only RP18 closeout pack (150 units, RP18.P02.M06.S01-RP18.P03.M02.S14, risk C) and its claims are supported by source inspection. The pack-level production_ready claim is correctly FALSE (status implemented_pending_review, runtime_ready false); the descriptor layer opens no AI legal workflows / precedent / clause-markup / DD-extraction runtime. Scope integrity is sound: the coverage validator computes deliverable/phase/micro distributions from the plan pack's real included_units (countBy over actual data) and asserts equality against declared requirements; the validator script deepEquals the contract JSON against the registry constants, descriptor, requirements, no-write attestation, and historical bindings (tail pack_id CP00-558); the model test mirrors these assertions; command-evidence records all gates passing (exit 0). No-write/no-real-data boundaries are enforced in code (frozen descriptors, all write/runtime/leak flags false, no fs/network/child_process in package src) and attested in the manifest. Claude remains a read-only reviewer and not final approver (claude_is_final_approval/promotes_claude_to_final_approval/claims_enterprise_trust_from_local_validation all false; allowed tools Read,Grep,Glob). Hermes patterns are used only as deterministic evidence/receipt descriptors (emits_hermes_runtime_receipt false; H18 is a validation gate, not embedded product runtime). Review-hardening preflight is clean (auth passed, valid JSON, no forbidden tools, full source inspection for this Risk C pack). One informational P3: final closeout artifacts (claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json) plus human approval are still pending by design and must complete before the pack is flipped to closed/production-ready.

findings.title: Final closeout remains gated on pending post-review artifacts and human approval (expected state)
findings.details: The manifest lists docs/closeout-packs/cp00-558/claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, and construction-inspection.json under evidence_refs/required_pack_artifacts, but only manifest.json and command-evidence.json currently exist in the pack directory, and artifacts/closeout-pack-claude-review/cp00-558/ has no raw-output.json or review-receipt.json yet. This is the expected state for status 'implemented_pending_review': those artifacts are produced by the post-review steps (raw capture from this review, receipt normalization/validation, finding adjudication, construction inspection) per command-evidence.json notes and the hardened_review_sequence. It is not a defect of the implementation, but it does mean this review alone does not close the pack.
findings.recommendation: Proceed through the remaining hardened_review_sequence steps (read_only_claude_run raw capture, receipt normalization/validation, finding adjudication, construction inspection, final closeout validation) and obtain human final approval before marking the pack closed or production_ready. Do not treat this read-only review as final approval.
